title: digitaria vulgaris
intro: Digitaria vulgaris, also known as finger grass or finger millet, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Digitaria vulgaris include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antioxidant, making it a valuable herb in various herbal preparations. Digitaria vulgaris is often used in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can also be taken as a powder or capsule supplement.
